packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch updates that survived the 7-day cooldown

Supply-chain risk premium for the vendored rrweb fork lineage. The PostHog Shai-Hulud 2.0 incident (Nov 24 2025) compromised @posthog/rrweb-record@0.0.31, which npm has since marked deprecated 'compromised'. Hold these for 21 days post-publish so a downstream republish has time to be flagged before we pull it.
Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs, not floating tags. Pairs with the workflow hard-rule in CONTRIBUTING.md.
